pi_items.source: Task prompt asks to save as "Revenue_Targets", and verifier checks for "Revenue_Targets.dva", which is the standard Oracle Analytics Desktop extension.
Task prompt explicitly asks to "Create a Horizontal Bar Chart".
Task prompt explicitly asks to "Add a Reference Line for the Average".
Task prompt explicitly asks to "Add a second Reference Line for a Constant target value of 300,000".
Checked setup_oracle_analytics.ps1, which copies C:\\workspace\\data\\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx to this exact Desktop path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Horizontal Bar chart with two reference lines (Average and a Constant value of 300,000) using the sample_order_lines2023.xlsx dataset located at C:\\Users\\Docker\\Desktop\\OracleAnalyticsData\\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx. The final workbook must be saved as Revenue_Targets.dva.
